creator: lchen@zen.lhaven.homeip.net
text:
Get compile errors in modules/access in relation to
	librdp_plugin_la-rdp.lo

Fix: 

The default behavior for configure is to auto detect libfreerdp.
	It only requires that it be 1.0.1 or newer.  But, it appears the
	structs have changed in 1.1.

	Adding '--disable-libfreerdp' to CONFIGURE_ARGS allows vlc to build
	for me.
How-To-Repeat: 	
	make rmconfig
	make <accept defaults>

	See errors of:

	rdp.c:201:27: error: no member named 'sw_gdi' in 'struct rdp_settings'
	rdp.c:202:27: error: no member named 'fullscreen' in 'struct rdp_settings'; did
	      you mean 'Fullscreen'?
	rdp.c:203:27: error: no member named 'hostname' in 'struct rdp_settings'
	rdp.c:204:27: error: no member named 'username' in 'struct rdp_settings'; did
	      you mean 'Username'?
	rdp.c:206:27: error: no member named 'password' in 'struct rdp_settings'; did
	      you mean 'Password'?
	rdp.c:208:27: error: no member named 'port' in 'struct rdp_settings'
	rdp.c:209:27: error: no member named 'encryption' in 'struct rdp_settings'
	rdp.c:220:36: error: no member named 'width' in 'struct rdp_settings'
	rdp.c:418:24: error: no member named 'context_size' in 'struct rdp_freerdp'; did
	      you mean 'ContextSize'?
